candidates.proposal: Add one repair pass that reads Lean stderr plus ideal-proof skeleton only after the first oracle check.
candidates.test_split_rule: Evaluate only after selection; do not tune on held-out test failures.

candidates.proposal: Expand or retune the allowed premise index/query recipe before adding broader proof-search machinery.
candidates.test_split_rule: Report held-out retrieval misses without tuning on the specific test proof body.
candidates.trigger: PREMISE_RETRIEVAL_MISS observed before the oracle revealed the needed premise.

candidates.proposal: Promote the next benchmark slice to Ring 1 with a local Lake/mathlib fixture or recovered UlamAI regression item.
candidates.test_split_rule: Use source/family splits and keep proof bodies withheld from Prover-Lab.
candidates.trigger: Lean-core environment is stable across at least five specimens.

non_goals: no provider/NIM routing from this v0 run
